name: @tupiflow-plugins/workflow-builder
//devDependencies: jsdom + @mozilla/readability + turndown are used by src/workers/fetch-article.mjs. Esbuild externalises them at build (via build.mjs `requiredNpmDeps`) and the customer host's node_modules provides them at runtime — they are NOT shipped in the plugin tarball. Declared here so local development (IDE import resolution, future worker tests) sees them; semver ranges MUST satisfy what the tupiflow host package.json installs, otherwise the host installer rejects with MissingNpmDepError.
